events.body: Good morning my dear, did you sleep well? I was thinking about you all night.
My uncle works at a private crypto exchange. He gave me a VIP tip, guaranteed 40% return in two weeks. Only close people know.
I already put in my savings and made HKD 80,000. I want us to build our future together. You just need to deposit into this wallet: bc1qxy2k...9zqmf. The window closes tonight, hurry.
Please don't tell your children, they won't understand our love. Trust me.
